title: Backup in 4 steps
subtitle: A complete Kubernetes-native disaster recovery workflow for your volumes and databases, on any public or private cloud.

steps.title: Install the Operator
steps.description: Deploy Stash via Helm into any Kubernetes cluster — EKS, GKE, AKS, or on-prem. One command, a few minutes.

steps.title: Define BackupConfiguration
steps.description: A single Kubernetes-native CRD declares the target workload or database, the backup schedule, retention policy, and which storage Repository to use.

steps.title: Monitor Sessions
steps.description: BackupSession objects give you real-time status, per-host snapshots, and structured events — query with kubectl or your existing Prometheus/Grafana stack.

steps.title: Restore Anytime
steps.description: Create a RestoreSession for full or selective recovery of databases and volumes. Works across namespaces and clusters.
